$rules.name: phone-extractor-san-cert
$rules.why: 45 0crawl vhosts share phone-extractor.0crawl.com's SAN cert. Tracked explicitly so fleet-runner cert reissue can target them one-by-one (target state: each gets its own cert).

a11y-quick.trl_evidence: Curated validation logic, error handling, some test coverage

accessibility-score.trl_ceiling_reason: Reaches TRL 8 with WCAG 2.2 full corpus + CSS-derived contrast estimation.
accessibility-score.trl_evidence: WCAG rule corpus, heading structure, image alt sampling.

ad-density.trl_ceiling_reason: Reaches TRL 7 with TCFv2 consent banner + sentinel-class detection.
ad-density.trl_evidence: Ad-slot detection by class/id patterns, network call counting.

address-extractor.trl_ceiling_reason: Real multi-country address extraction needs libpostal trained data (~400MB) or per-country gazetteers at ~1 person-week each. CPU-only without them tops at TRL 5.
address-extractor.trl_evidence: Regex + small gazetteer. Toy for the multi-country general case.

admin-finder.trl_ceiling_reason: Authenticated admin discovery requires site-specific credentials or session state.
admin-finder.trl_evidence: Expanded admin path corpus with HEAD/GET fallback, status-to-signal triage, confidence verdicts, SSRF guard, and tests.

analyze-headers.trl_evidence: Basic multi-step logic without test coverage

anon-conf-poll.trl_evidence: polling app, basic UI and state

api-extractor.trl_evidence: 31 canonical OpenAPI paths across stacks, AsyncAPI detection, gRPC-Web fingerprint, GraphQL introspection, auth-scheme inference.

api-first.trl_evidence: Multi-function service with basic error handling

apikey-scanner.trl_evidence: Entropy-based + pattern-matched API key detection in HTML+JS.

apikey-service.description: API key keystore for the 0exec mesh: issue/verify/revoke/list/purge. SQLite-backed, admin-token-gated. THE FLEET'S SINGLE POINT OF COMPROMISE — see fleet-state/OPS.md for hardening + rotation. NOT internet-exposed.
apikey-service.trl_ceiling_reason: Reaches TRL 8 with: hash keys at rest (SHA-256), per-IP rate limit on /verify, audit log table for /issue+/revoke, full test coverage, automated SQLite backup. None require external paid services.
apikey-service.trl_evidence: Working keystore w/ SQLite + admin auth + WAL. 2026-05-13 added constant-time admin compare + method enforcement + max body size. Still: keys plaintext at rest, no rate-limit, no audit log, no tests.

asn-lookup.trl_evidence: Curated validation logic, error handling, some test coverage

biz-classifier.trl_evidence: Per-vertical keyword DB (16 top-level + 15 tech sub-verticals), compliance-badge detector, CTA gazetteer, multi-page probe with verdict.

blocklist-checker.trl_ceiling_reason: Without continuous feed mirroring, this is 80% external-data dependency. Real upgrade is a feed-sync daemon, not algorithm work.

broken-links.trl_evidence: 1.4.1: ErrorClass taxonomy with 14 stable kinds (timeout/dns_failure/conn_refused/conn_reset/tls_error/hard_404/hard_4xx/hard_5xx/unauthorized/rate_limited/soft_404/too_many_redirects/ssrf_blocked/unknown); Soft404Detector with per-origin baseline; redirect hop tracking; ClassCounts histogram; client.Fetch migration. 9/10 corpus PASS; verified evidence: 403 from twitter.com correctly classifies as 'unauthorized' not 'broken'.

bucket-finder.trl_ceiling_reason: Enumeration (proving bucket exists, listing contents) requires paid threat intel, leaked wordlists, or HackerOne project data.

caa-checker.trl_evidence: CAA record parsing, issuance prediction, IODEF endpoint validation.

captcha-detector.trl_evidence: Sitekey extraction, provider fingerprinting across reCAPTCHA v2/v3/hCaptcha/Turnstile/etc.

cas.trl_evidence: Curated validation logic, error handling, some test coverage

cdn-detector.trl_evidence: RFC-aware DNS+PTR+ASN correlation, header fingerprinting, evidence-diversity confidence scoring.

clickjacking-tester.trl_ceiling_reason: Browser-level frame behavior needs real rendering for unusual CSP/sandbox cases.
clickjacking-tester.trl_evidence: Classifies X-Frame-Options, CSP frame-ancestors, iframe embeddability risk, parser edge cases, and tests.

cognitive-load.trl_evidence: Multi-function structure, limited error handling and tests

comment-extractor.trl_evidence: 1.3.1: classification across 11 CommentKind labels (boilerplate/ie_conditional/todo/deprecation/internal_path/internal_email/credential_leak/source_map/react_dev/vue_ssr/dev_note) with info/low/medium/high severity. Credential detectors: AWS access keys, GCP service tokens, GitHub tokens, Stripe live/test keys, JWTs, PEM private keys, inline api_key/password assignments. HTML entity decoding pre-classification. Summary.Notable surfaces medium+high findings. 22 unit tests. 10/10 corpus PASS.

company-size.trl_evidence: Curated validation logic, error handling, some test coverage

complete-gardener-planner.trl_evidence: planning app, calendar and checklist logic

compression-tester.trl_evidence: Basic multi-step logic without test coverage

cookie-checker.trl_evidence: 1.3.1: publicsuffix-aware domain scope (etld1_scope/parent_scope/public_suffix_scope severity tiers replace single string-suffix heuristic); CMP+tracker cookie fingerprinting across 19 vendors (OneTrust, Cookiebot, Quantcast, etc. + GA/Facebook/Hotjar/CF); ClassCounts taxonomy {cmp,tracker,session,other}; secure_on_http warning. 10/10 corpus PASS; verified: __cf_bm correctly fingerprints to vendor=cloudflare.

cors-scanner.trl_evidence: Endpoint discovery, CORS preflight testing, credential+wildcard checks, risk categorization.

cors-tester.trl_evidence: Curated validation logic, error handling, some test coverage

crawl-web-application.trl_evidence: Basic multi-step logic without test coverage

crlf-tester.trl_evidence: Multi-function structure, limited error handling and tests

currency-detector.trl_evidence: Symbol regex + locale patterns + currency-switcher heuristics.

customer-logos.trl_evidence: Curated validation logic, error handling, some test coverage

d3-graph.trl_evidence: visualization library, mature D3 binding, test coverage expected

data-inventory.trl_evidence: Curated validation logic, error handling, some test coverage

debug-detector.trl_evidence: Stack-trace and debug-banner detection in error pages.

dependency-counter.trl_evidence: Multi-function service with basic error handling

dir-listing.trl_evidence: RFC-compliant directory listing parser with SSRF guards, tests, and verdict structure

dns-record.trl_evidence: Basic multi-step logic without test coverage

domain-details.trl_evidence: Basic multi-step logic without test coverage

dtss.trl_evidence: Curated validation logic, error handling, some test coverage

email-extractor.trl_evidence: RFC-light parser, 5444-domain disposable gazetteer, opt-in MX validation, multi-page crawl with frontier, Cloudflare/obfuscation decoder.

email-harvester.trl_ceiling_reason: Emails hidden behind JavaScript or forms require rendering and interaction.
email-harvester.trl_evidence: Same-domain contact/about/legal discovery, email extraction with found_on evidence, dedupe, SSRF guard, and tests.

emotional-tone.trl_ceiling_reason: Sentiment with negation/sarcasm/irony requires syntactic parsing and context — fundamental language-understanding gap. CPU-only lexicon approach plateaus.

env-finder.trl_evidence: .env / config file probing at common locations.

feed-finder.trl_ceiling_reason: Dynamic feed links hidden behind JavaScript need headless rendering for full coverage.
feed-finder.trl_evidence: RSS/Atom/JSON autodiscovery, conventional feed probes, WordPress JSON hinting, feed parsing, source/confidence output, and unit tests.

file-inclusion.trl_ceiling_reason: needs auth state for deeper testing
file-inclusion.trl_evidence: Hardcoded LFI payloads, basic fuzzing, no SSRF guards

founding-year.trl_evidence: Curated validation logic, error handling, some test coverage

funding-detector.trl_evidence: 189-investor gazetteer (top global VCs/angels), 11-currency regex with Asian numbering, round/year context windows, evidence trails.

gdpr-compliance.trl_evidence: 1.3.1: TrackerHit per-vendor structured detection with SignalCount/Confidence (high≥3 / medium=2 / low=1)/InScriptSrc/InInlineJS/MatchedSignals replaces flat []string; 20 CMP fingerprints + 17 tracker vendors; PolicyHit gains ContentLength+ContentType+SameOrigin to flag stub policies and third-party-hosted privacy URLs. 10/10 corpus PASS; verified evidence: NYT shows GTM medium-confidence (2 signals, both src+inline).

geo-places.trl_evidence: geo service, place lookup and validation

go-catalog-service.description: Renders services.json into the public catalog at catalog.0exec.com. Reads the registry's JSON slices and presents browsable tables of all fleet services with auth-help, TRL, mesh, and links.
go-catalog-service.trl_evidence: Live for months, serves catalog.0exec.com production traffic

go-fleet-dns-sync.description: Hetzner DNS reconciler. Targets the Hetzner Cloud API (api.hetzner.cloud/v1, Bearer auth, RRSet-oriented) — the canonical DNS surface that supersedes the deprecated dns.hetzner.com Console API. Reads services-registry/services.json, diffs against actual zone state, applies the delta. Pulls the Cloud API token from go-fleet-secrets. 30-min ticker. Extras never auto-deleted.
go-fleet-dns-sync.trl_ceiling_reason: Per-zone instance; ceiling lifts with multi-zone via parallel deployments.
go-fleet-dns-sync.trl_evidence: Hetzner Cloud API client (api.hetzner.cloud/v1, Bearer auth) + RRSet-flattening on read + single-record RRSets on write + registry parser + 3-way diff + idempotent apply + paginated rrset listing. 13 tests cover diff/create/update/dry-run/extras-never-deleted/non-mesh-ignored.

go-fleet-graph.description: Fleet graph collector. Aggregates service-to-service call observations emitted by go-common/graph into 1m/1h/1d buckets in SQLite. Serves /events (ingest), /graph + /summary (queries), /service/<slug>/{callers,calls}, /lookup/<slug> (powers graph.Lookup), /drift (declared-vs-observed). Mirror of services-registry refreshes every 5min.
go-fleet-graph.trl_evidence: Two-sided observation (outbound RoundTripper + inbound middleware), schema-versioned wire format, drop-oldest ring buffer with bounded memory, fail-open if collector unreachable. SQLite WAL with /1m/1h/1d retention. Recursion guard prevents observing self-POSTs. Unit tests in collector + go-common.
go-fleet-graph.trl_ceiling_reason: Single-node SQLite. Lifts to 8 once paired with periodic snapshot backup and a multi-collector consensus design for high-RPS callers.

go-fleet-preflight.description: Pre-deploy validation. POST /preflight {repo, secrets?} runs every required check in parallel: registry presence, DNS resolution, port collision, required secrets metadata. Returns 200 (all green) or 424 (any red) with detailed checklist. Read-only.
go-fleet-preflight.trl_ceiling_reason: Each new check is one goroutine. Lift bound is breadth of checks.
go-fleet-preflight.trl_evidence: 4 checks (registry, dns, port, per-secret); fan-out parallel; 424 Failed Dependency for red. Tests cover missing-registry/port-collision/vault-404/full-success/empty-repo.

go-fleet-secrets.description: Encrypted secrets vault. Holds infrastructure tokens (Hetzner DNS, GitHub PAT, SMTP, platform API keys). NaCl secretbox at rest, per-secret nonce, scoped reads via gateway-injected X-Auth-User against consumers allowlist, separate X-Admin-Token for writes. Audit log per access.
go-fleet-secrets.trl_ceiling_reason: Single-node SQLite. Ceiling lifts to 8 once paired with sealed offsite master-key backup.
go-fleet-secrets.trl_evidence: NaCl secretbox (XSalsa20-Poly1305) per-secret nonce; master key from env (fail-fast on missing); constant-time admin compare; metadata-only list; audit log every access. 16 tests pass.

go-fleet-visualizer.description: Fleet graph visualizer. Operator surface (keystore-auth) renders a force-directed live topology with click-to-drill, mesh filter, time-window selector, and a drift dialog comparing declared-vs-observed edges. Public surface at /public shows sanitised (caller -> target) counts only — no latencies, no internal hosts. Frontend uses vis-network from CDN, vanilla JS, no build step.
go-fleet-visualizer.trl_evidence: Two-surface auth split via selective middleware. Proxies to collector for all queries. Auto-refresh every 30s. SRI hash on CDN vis-network bundle. Path templating-aware drill-down. No tests yet — first iteration.
go-fleet-visualizer.trl_ceiling_reason: Vis-network handles ~500 nodes comfortably. Lifts to 7 with server-side layout caching + WebGL-backed renderer for >500-node fleets.

go-html-proxy.trl_evidence: HTML proxy scaffold without substantive handler logic

go-information-leakage.description: Detects information disclosure patterns: internal paths, version strings, stack traces, build IDs in HTML/headers/error pages.
go-information-leakage.trl_ceiling_reason: needs real browser DOM for full JavaScript inspection
go-information-leakage.trl_evidence: Leakage detection with SSRF protection and multi-fetch, no test coverage

go-js-proxy.name: Proxy (Go+JS)
go-js-proxy.trl_evidence: Legacy DOM-only render proxy. Production, load-bearing for fleet.

go-js-proxy-network.description: JS-render proxy returning rendered DOM plus full network log (every request fired, response headers, sizes, timing) + console + performance.
go-js-proxy-network.trl_evidence: Live HTTPS, chromedp + CDP event capture (network/console/perf/cookies), Alpine+chromium 190MB, safehttp SSRF guard verified live (blocks 127/10/169.254.169.254).

go-pentest-asset-inventory.description: Source of truth for every known asset per program. Recon services upsert; continuous-monitor diffs daily to fire scans only on NEW assets. The compounding-revenue substrate of the fleet.
go-pentest-asset-inventory.trl_ceiling_reason: Single-node SQLite. Fine until ~1M assets per program; sharding by program or Postgres later.
go-pentest-asset-inventory.trl_evidence: SQLite (modernc.org); transactional upsert with tag-union + tech-overwrite; /assets/diff returns new/updated/removed for continuous-monitor; tests pass.

go-pentest-asset-scope-resolver.description: Wildcard scope expansion: composes cert-transparency + subfinder + scope-guard to expand a program wildcard scope into a concrete in-scope subdomain list.
go-pentest-asset-scope-resolver.trl_ceiling_reason: Depends on upstream fleet services and live program scope data quality.
go-pentest-asset-scope-resolver.trl_evidence: Parallel CT/subfinder fanout, apex-bounded host normalization, scope-guard filtering, API-key forwarding, merge behavior tests.

go-pentest-audit-log.description: Append-only audit log for the pentest fleet. Every scan-start / scope-denied / finding-submitted gets recorded. Legal floor + CYA.
go-pentest-audit-log.trl_evidence: Pure-Go SQLite, deterministic (ts,actor,action,target,program,tool) hash for dedup, append-only by design.

go-pentest-bounty-scope-checker.description: Given a domain, returns which bug-bounty programs include it in scope (sorted by max payout). Embedded seed of ~10 well-known programs (GitHub, GitLab, Shopify, PayPal, Anthropic, Google, Microsoft, Tesla, Uber, X).
go-pentest-bounty-scope-checker.trl_ceiling_reason: Production freshness depends on continuously updated program feeds.
go-pentest-bounty-scope-checker.trl_evidence: Bug-bounty scope matcher uses curated program seed data, regex caching, payout sorting, structured matches, and tests.

go-pentest-cert-transparency.description: crt.sh wrapper with 24h SQLite cache. Returns SAN-derived subdomains or full cert records (issuer/dates/SANs).
go-pentest-cert-transparency.trl_ceiling_reason: Add Censys + Google CT in parallel for redundancy.
go-pentest-cert-transparency.trl_evidence: crt.sh fetcher + SQLite cache (modernc) + wildcard-skip + SAN-suffix filter; tested for normalization, cache hits, subdomain filter.

go-pentest-chaos-sync.description: Background syncer for ProjectDiscovery Chaos public dataset. SQLite-backed (modernc.org/sqlite, CGo-free) cache of subdomains keyed by root_domain; daily refresh; O(log N) lookups; zero target-network traffic.
go-pentest-chaos-sync.trl_ceiling_reason: Delta-tracking and program ranking needed for 7+.
go-pentest-chaos-sync.trl_evidence: Downloads + parses Chaos public-bug-bounty index; SQLite WAL + bulk-tx upserts; 4-way concurrent zip fetch; daily refresh cron; trigger rate-limited to 10min; lookup tested in-memory.

go-pentest-codec.description: Encode/decode + JWT segment decoder. 11 formats (base64 std/url/raw, base32, hex, url, html, gzip, zlib, json-string); alg=none/path-traversable-kid flags on JWT.
go-pentest-codec.trl_evidence: Pure-stdlib codec table; full roundtrip tests; JWT decoder flags dangerous algs.

go-pentest-continuous-monitor.description: Daily cron-style scheduler that diffs asset-inventory per program and enqueues scan jobs only for NEW assets. Turns one-shot recon into a subscription — money compounds with the asset universe, not manpower.
go-pentest-continuous-monitor.trl_ceiling_reason: Bounded by job-queue throughput. Sequential per-program scheduler keeps the reasoning simple.
go-pentest-continuous-monitor.trl_evidence: Programs CRUD + DueProgramsAsOf scheduler + RunOnce composing diff + fan-out with scanner×kind applicability filter; 19 tests pass stubbed against asset-inventory + job-queue.

go-pentest-cors-misconfig-prober.description: Active CORS-misconfig prober. 5 attacker-Origin probes (reflection, null-origin, suffix-bypass, pre-subdomain, case-fold). Reflection+Allow-Credentials=high.
go-pentest-cors-misconfig-prober.trl_evidence: 5 active probes, reflection+credentials high-sev detection, suffix-confusion + pre-subdomain bypass, case-fold. Tested positive (high) + negative.

go-pentest-cvss.description: CVSS 3.1 base score calculator. Pure-Go FIRST.org spec implementation. Takes a vector, returns base/severity/impact/exploitability.
go-pentest-cvss.trl_evidence: Pure-Go CVSS 3.1; tested vs 6 canonical FIRST.org examples incl. 0.0/10.0 boundaries and scope-changed XSS. Stateless; CPU-only.

go-pentest-dashboard.description: Browser dashboard for the pentest fleet. Single-page HTML app (Tailwind CDN, vanilla JS) with tabs for Preflight, Programs, Recon, Scan, Findings, Report. Calls every passive scanner via the api_key in browser localStorage. Human-facing GUI for the same flow go-pentest-cli and go-pentest-walkthrough automate.
go-pentest-dashboard.trl_ceiling_reason: Bounded by what the fleet exposes; active probing tools need auth + deploy before they can be surfaced safely.
go-pentest-dashboard.trl_evidence: Single index.html, no build step, CORS-permissive fleet endpoints. 6 tabs covering recon → scan → triage → render.

go-pentest-dedup-fingerprint.description: Semantic dedup of findings. Normalizes query-param order, UUIDs in path, timestamps, whitespace in body, then sha256s. Stops one XSS reported by 4 scanners from looking like 4 dupes.
go-pentest-dedup-fingerprint.trl_ceiling_reason: Normalization rule corpus grows with bug-class variety; current 6 rules handle the common cases.
go-pentest-dedup-fingerprint.trl_evidence: 6 normalization rules with table tests (param-order, UUID-in-path, numeric IDs, timestamps, whitespace, vuln-class/host invariance); 18 tests pass; TTL reaper for expiring fingerprints.

go-pentest-dependency-cve.description: CPE -> NVD JSON 2.0 + CISA KEV cross-flag. Per-request fetch (no local cache yet). Composes with go-pentest-httpx tech detection.
go-pentest-dependency-cve.trl_ceiling_reason: TRL 7 with local CVE feed primitive caching NVD/GHSA delta-updates.
go-pentest-dependency-cve.trl_evidence: NVD JSON 2.0 + CISA KEV cross-flag. Per-request fetch (no local CVE DB cache yet). Free, no API key.

go-pentest-disclosure-policy-finder.description: Probes 12 disclosure-policy paths and classifies bounty/VDP/safe-harbor/unknown/none. Extracts Contact/PGP from security.txt and detects platform hints (HackerOne/Bugcrowd/Intigriti/YesWeHack/Synack).
go-pentest-disclosure-policy-finder.trl_evidence: 12 probe paths, RFC 9116 parser, 9 bounty-platform regexes, 4 safe-harbor regexes, class-priority resolver. Extends fleet security-txt with VDP-vs-bounty classification.

go-pentest-exploit-verifier.description: Gate between possible-finding and submit-bot. Runs deterministic confirmation per vuln class: SSRF via OOB callback, XSS via marker reflection, IDOR via session-stripped re-fetch, JWT alg-none, open-redirect, subdomain-takeover.
go-pentest-exploit-verifier.trl_ceiling_reason: Each verifier is a thin recipe — lifts as verifier coverage grows. Bounded by OOB collector quality for blind classes.
go-pentest-exploit-verifier.trl_evidence: 7 verifier classes (ssrf-blind/-cloud-metadata, xss-reflected/-dom, idor, jwt-alg-none, open-redirect, subdomain-takeover, default). All upstream deps stubbed in 24 tests. Scope-guard fail-closed.

go-pentest-favicon-hash.description: Shodan-style mmh3 favicon hash with known-tech lookup (~15 seeds: Tomcat, Spring Boot, Jenkins, Grafana, Jupyter, phpMyAdmin, GitLab, FortiNet, F5, etc.).
go-pentest-favicon-hash.trl_evidence: mmh3 via spaolacci/murmur3, Python-compatible base64.encodebytes (76-char wrap), embedded lookup. Tests on determinism + sensitivity.

go-pentest-finding-triage.description: Auto-grades raw findings into submit_ready / needs_review / drop using 8 rules (missing fields, fingerprint-dupe, scope-deny, noise-class, confidence floor, severity promote, evidence-present, verified-class). Reasons array surfaces every decision.
go-pentest-finding-triage.trl_ceiling_reason: Lift bound is rule-corpus size. Adding ML or LLM-based triage would push the ceiling but break the pure-rule explainability.
go-pentest-finding-triage.trl_evidence: Pure-rule engine (8 rules) with table-driven isolated tests + integration tests stubbing scope-guard and dedup-fingerprint. Dependency-error policy: neutral with logged reason.

go-pentest-findings-store.description: Central deduplicated findings store for the pentest fleet. SQLite-backed (pure Go modernc); collapses same finding from multiple scanners via dedup_key with seen_count.
go-pentest-findings-store.trl_ceiling_reason: Single-node SQLite is fine until ~1M findings; horizontal shard or Postgres later.
go-pentest-findings-store.trl_evidence: modernc.org/sqlite (pure-Go SQLite); upsert+dedup via ON CONFLICT RETURNING; tested for insert/dedup/list/filter/stats/status.

go-pentest-github-dorks.description: GitHub Search API dorking for leaked credentials: 31 curated patterns (AWS keys, .env, private keys, Slack/Stripe/PAT tokens, kubeconfig, npm/Docker creds). Rate-limit aware; pairs with go-pentest-trufflehog for verification.
go-pentest-github-dorks.trl_ceiling_reason: GitHub Search has no regex; semantic dedup + verifier-loop integration cap the climb at 6.
go-pentest-github-dorks.trl_evidence: 31 dorks across credentials/private-keys/internal/config; uses google/go-github v66; reads X-RateLimit-Remaining and backs off; catalog-hygiene + missing-token + missing-scope tests.

go-pentest-http-replay.description: Captures + reproduces HTTP request/response pairs as bug-bounty evidence. Generates canonical curl PoC, replays for diff, imports raw HTTP from Burp. Uses go-common safehttp (SSRF-safe).
go-pentest-http-replay.trl_ceiling_reason: Single-node SQLite. Fine for evidence retention at typical bug-bounty scale; lifts when paired with object storage for large bodies.
go-pentest-http-replay.trl_evidence: go-common safehttp client; 256KB response cap; sha256 body-hash for rerun diff; 19 tests pass including curl-builder edge cases.

go-pentest-httpx.description: One HTTP fingerprint per request: status, title, server, TLS cert summary, ~25 tech-detection signatures. Parallel batch with worker cap. Replaces chaining tech-stack + security-headers + cdn-detector.
go-pentest-httpx.trl_ceiling_reason: Wrap wappalyzergo for full 3000+ fingerprint DB.
go-pentest-httpx.trl_evidence: Single+batch probes, parallel with worker cap, TLS extract, ~25 tech-detection signatures (CDNs, frameworks, CMS, front-end libs). safehttp-protected. Tested.

go-pentest-job-queue.description: Durable workflow queue. POST jobs, workers /claim → /complete or /fail. Crash-resilient via SQLite WAL; expired leases auto-requeue every 15s with exponential backoff. Backbone for orchestrator + continuous-monitor + every long-running scan.
go-pentest-job-queue.trl_ceiling_reason: Single-node SQLite. Fine up to ~10k jobs/sec; graduates to NATS JetStream or Postgres skip-locked beyond that.
go-pentest-job-queue.trl_evidence: Atomic claim via tx (SELECT-pending → UPDATE-running); lease-expiry reaper goroutine; exp-backoff retry. Full coverage on enqueue/claim/complete/fail/retry/reap/stats.

go-pentest-leak-bounty-policy.description: Curated registry: which bug-bounty programs PAY for credential-leak disclosures, broken down by leak class (own_employee / shared_secret / customer_cred / canary). Use BEFORE writing up a leaked-credential disclosure — most platforms treat customer-side leaks as goodwill-only; only Stripe / GitHub partner / AWS canary / GitLab pay per-leak. 25 programs seeded.
go-pentest-leak-bounty-policy.trl_evidence: 25 hand-curated programs with per-program LeakPolicy across 4 leak classes (own_employee/shared_secret/customer_cred/canary) and credential_prefixes for token classification. 7 unit tests pin: registry parses, slugs unique, prefixes unique, sk_live_ -> Stripe + canary in_scope, shpat_ -> Shopify + customer_cred out_of_scope, >=3 canary-paying programs.
go-pentest-leak-bounty-policy.trl_ceiling_reason: Ceiling 7 with quarterly auto-refresh from each program's policy URL + admin /reload endpoint. Pure manual curation caps at 5 because policies drift faster than humans can re-audit at scale.

go-pentest-notify.description: Multi-sink notification fanout for the pentest fleet (Telegram/Discord/Slack/email/webhook/ntfy/Matrix/Teams/etc.) via containrrr/shoutrrr.
go-pentest-notify.trl_ceiling_reason: Ceiling = shoutrrr sink count + HMAC webhook auth.
go-pentest-notify.trl_evidence: Wraps containrrr/shoutrrr v0.8 (20+ sinks). Default-from-env, per-request URL override, secret-hiding /sinks.

go-pentest-nuclei.description: Nuclei wrapper: scope-guarded YAML-template scanner (cves/exposures/misconfigs/takeovers). Pre-flights every target through go-pentest-scope-guard; forwards findings to go-pentest-findings-store. Bundles nuclei binary in container.
go-pentest-nuclei.trl_ceiling_reason: Pinned-binary wrapping; templates refresh cadence + concurrency stress-testing gate the climb to 7.
go-pentest-nuclei.trl_evidence: Wraps nuclei binary; scope-guard pre-flight (fail-closed); -jsonl streaming parser; best-effort findings forwarding via safehttp; 5 unit tests covering 400/405/scope-empty/templates/JSONL-parse.

go-pentest-oob-collector.description: Out-of-band HTTP callback catcher for blind XSS/SSRF/RCE findings. Allocates short-lived tokens, public /c/{token} catch endpoint, authenticated polling API. v0.2 wraps projectdiscovery/interactsh for DNS exfil.
go-pentest-oob-collector.trl_ceiling_reason: Ceiling unlocked once projectdiscovery/interactsh is wrapped for DNS+SMTP exfil. HTTP half remains useful as simple-case catcher.
go-pentest-oob-collector.trl_evidence: HTTP-callback path tested end-to-end (create session -> fire /c/{token} -> poll hits). XFF-aware client IP capture. DNS exfil pending v0.2.

go-pentest-orchestrator.description: Master end-to-end pipeline. POST a campaign and the state machine drives scope→recon→scan→triage→verify→submit through every other go-pentest-* service. 30s ticker auto-advances. SUBMIT_DRY_RUN=1 by default — the unattended money loop.
go-pentest-orchestrator.trl_ceiling_reason: Bounded by submit-bot's platform-API stability. Once submit-bot ships TRL 8, this trails one step behind at 7-8.
go-pentest-orchestrator.trl_evidence: SQLite state machine; idempotent per-state advance; append-only event log; 30s ticker; 16 tests pass with every fleet dep stubbed (httptest mux).

go-pentest-payloads.description: Serves payload corpora (XSS/SQLi/SSRF/SSTI/XXE/CRLF/NoSQLi/GraphQL/path-traversal) by class+variant. Random-sample API for taint fuzzing.
go-pentest-payloads.trl_evidence: 9 classes seeded with real-world payloads (xss reflected+polyglot, sqli error+time, ssrf cloud-meta+local, ssti jinja2+twig, xxe, crlf, nosqli, graphql, path-traversal). Random + filter APIs tested.

go-pentest-rate-coordinator.description: Global per-host token-bucket rate limiter. Every active prober calls POST /acquire {host, weight} before firing — prevents multiple scanners from collectively DDoS-ing a target.
go-pentest-rate-coordinator.trl_ceiling_reason: In-process state — single instance. Multi-instance needs Redis (sethvargo/go-limiter has the backend ready).
go-pentest-rate-coordinator.trl_evidence: golang.org/x/time/rate (stdlib-blessed) buckets per host; tested burst, deny, distinct hosts, policy override, wait+context cancel.

go-pentest-report-templater.description: Turns a structured Finding into a platform-ready markdown report. Ships HackerOne/Bugcrowd/Intigriti templates. Optional CVSS enrichment via go-pentest-cvss. Highest-leverage service in the fleet.
go-pentest-report-templater.trl_ceiling_reason: Add org-specific templates + screenshot embed + direct HackerOne API submission.
go-pentest-report-templater.trl_evidence: 3 platform templates using stdlib text/template, custom func map (title/code/indent/add1), CVSS enrichment via go-pentest-cvss with graceful degrade. Tested for render + missing-template + per-platform output.

go-pentest-scope-guard.description: Hard scope check before any active prober fires. POST /check {target, program_id} -> {allowed, reason, matched_by}. Matches hostname/wildcard/CIDR/regex; exclusions always win. Legal floor of the pentest fleet.
go-pentest-scope-guard.trl_ceiling_reason: Ceiling is whatever feeds it programs — once go-pentest-bounty-scope-checker exists, scope-guard is a CDN over its data.
go-pentest-scope-guard.trl_evidence: In-memory store, hostname/wildcard/CIDR/regex matchers with anchored regex cache; exclusion-wins logic; suffix-confusion regression test.

go-pentest-screenshot.description: Headless-Chromium screenshot evidence for pentest reports. POST /shot {url,viewport,before_js,after_js} → PNG + DOM hash + title + status. 24h SQLite cache keyed by sha256 of inputs.
go-pentest-screenshot.trl_ceiling_reason: Bounded by Chromium-headless RAM (1 GiB shm) and the fact that one container is one Chromium instance.
go-pentest-screenshot.trl_evidence: chromedp + Chromium in Alpine container; pure-Go SQLite cache; 14 tests pass via fake Capturer (no Chromium needed to build).

go-pentest-secrets-scanner.description: Regex+entropy secret scanner. ~30 vendor rules (AWS, GitHub, GitLab, Slack, Stripe, Google, Twilio, SendGrid, Mailgun, Anthropic, OpenAI, HF, Discord, npm, JWT, RSA/EC/OpenSSH/PGP keys).
go-pentest-secrets-scanner.trl_ceiling_reason: TRL 8 with verified-secret feature (call vendor API to confirm key is live).
go-pentest-secrets-scanner.trl_evidence: ~30 vendor rules, Shannon-entropy gate via math.Log2, line+context+redaction. Tested vs real-looking fixtures.

go-pentest-subfinder.description: Multi-source passive subdomain enumeration: crt.sh (via our own cert-transparency), HackerTarget, AnubisDB, Wayback. Free sources only.
go-pentest-subfinder.trl_evidence: 4 passive sources fanned out in parallel with per-source timing + error capture, merged with dedup + suffix filter. No paid keys required.

go-pentest-submit-bot.description: Files findings to HackerOne / Bugcrowd / Intigriti via their APIs, or via security.txt email as fallback. Rate-limit + daily-cap aware. Dry-run mode for verification. The actual money step.
go-pentest-submit-bot.trl_ceiling_reason: Ceiling lifts to 8 once real H1/BC/Intigriti creds are verified end-to-end and the rendered-markdown shape is confirmed against the platforms' parsers.
go-pentest-submit-bot.trl_evidence: 4 platform adapters (H1/BC/Intigriti/email) with stubbed-creds + rate-limit + daily-cap. 23 tests pass via httptest. NOT yet round-tripped against real platform APIs — TRL stays at 4 until verified end-to-end.

go-pentest-takeover-checker.description: Subdomain-takeover scanner. Resolves CNAME, probes HTTP, matches signatures from go-pentest-takeover-fingerprints. Severity none/possible/likely.
go-pentest-takeover-checker.trl_evidence: CNAME + HTTP probe + signature match. Severity scoring combines CNAME-known-vendor + body match. Confirmed tier (vendor registration check) deferred.

go-pentest-takeover-fingerprints.description: Subdomain takeover signature DB. 17 curated vendors (AWS S3, GitHub Pages, Heroku, Fastly, Shopify, Vercel, Netlify, Azure, Cargo, WordPress, Tumblr, Zendesk, Surge, Ghost, ReadMe, Intercom, Unbounce).
go-pentest-takeover-fingerprints.trl_evidence: 17 curated signatures from can-i-take-over-xyz + in-the-wild. CNAME+status+body multi-signal match. Tested positive (S3) + negative cases.

go-pentest-target-normalizer.description: Canonicalizes free-form pentest targets (URL/host/IP/CIDR). Returns kind, eTLD+1, private-IP flag. Foundation primitive every active prober calls before doing anything else.
go-pentest-target-normalizer.trl_ceiling_reason: Ceiling is whatever publicsuffix list covers; no external deps to break.
go-pentest-target-normalizer.trl_evidence: Stdlib net/url + golang.org/x/net/{idna,publicsuffix}; pure CPU; full test coverage on URL/host/IP/CIDR/IDN/private-IP paths.

go-pentest-trufflehog.description: Trufflehog wrapper: scans repos/git/filesystem for VERIFIED secrets (--only-verified). 700+ detectors live-tested against providers. Upgrades go-pentest-secrets-scanner with verification.
go-pentest-trufflehog.trl_ceiling_reason: Wraps upstream trufflehog binary; advancing requires custom concurrency control and deduplication.
go-pentest-trufflehog.trl_evidence: Wraps trufflehog binary in --only-verified; supports git/github/filesystem sources; argv-injection guards; path-escape guards; 6 unit tests including TestScan_filesystemEscape.

go-pentest-walkthrough.description: HTTP equivalent of go-pentest-cli — single-domain pentest flow as REST API. /preflight, /recon, /findings, /report + /sessions for async scan with per-finding manual triage override. Pause/resume per session.
go-pentest-walkthrough.trl_ceiling_reason: Same ceiling as orchestrator — bounded by submit-bot end-to-end verification.
go-pentest-walkthrough.trl_evidence: Same idempotent state-machine shape as orchestrator + manual-override hooks (decide, pause, advance). 22 tests pass over stub fleet endpoints.

go-pentest-wayback-urls.description: Historical URL discovery via web.archive.org CDX. Returns every URL ever crawled with status + MIME + auto-flagged interesting extensions (.bak/.sql/.env/.zip).
go-pentest-wayback-urls.trl_evidence: Wayback CDX API client; MIME+status filters; ~15 interesting-extension signatures (backup/config/key/sqlite/dump).

go-pentest-wordlists.description: Serves curated pentest wordlists (dirs, subdomains, params, fuzz) by category with SHA256 integrity. Random-sample API. Designed to grow via SecLists submodule.
go-pentest-wordlists.trl_evidence: Disk-backed catalog with SHA256, reservoir-sample random API, paged reads. Ships with starter dirs/subdomains/params. CPU-only.

google-taxonomy.trl_evidence: Minimal function count, no parsing or validation logic

graphql-introspection.trl_ceiling_reason: Authenticated GraphQL schemas need user-supplied tokens and role-aware probing.
graphql-introspection.trl_evidence: GraphQL endpoint probing and introspection checks with structured responses, SSRF safety, and tests.

hidden-fields.trl_evidence: Multi-function structure, limited error handling and tests

host-header.trl_evidence: Multi-function structure, limited error handling and tests

hsts-checker.trl_ceiling_reason: needs real browser DOM for verification
hsts-checker.trl_evidence: HSTS validation with tests and SSRF protection, lightweight verdict logic

http-method-tester.trl_evidence: Basic multi-step logic without test coverage

http-protocol.trl_evidence: Multi-function structure, limited error handling and tests

idor-finder.trl_ceiling_reason: True IDOR proof requires authenticated sessions and object ownership context.
idor-finder.trl_evidence: Finds numeric/UUID IDs in path/query, generates tampered variants, compares status/body hashes, classifies auth guards, and tests.

iframe-analyzer.trl_evidence: 1.3.1: real CSP3 §6.7.7.7 frame-ancestors source-list parser (none/self/wildcard/scheme/host with port/path/wildcard kinds); X-Frame-Options parser (DENY/SAMEORIGIN/ALLOW-FROM with deprecation flag); ComputeFramingPosture cross-check returning {deny,sameorigin,explicit,open}+Conflicts; client.Fetch. 10/10 corpus PASS; verified: Cloudflare correctly flagged with verdict=deny + conflict 'CSP says deny, XFO disagrees: sameorigin'.

ipv6-checker.trl_evidence: Basic multi-step logic without test coverage

jsbundle-routes.description: Extracts React Router / Vue Router / Next.js / Express route configs from recovered JS bundles. Surfaces unlinked admin/internal routes.
jsbundle-routes.trl_evidence: AST-like pattern match on recovered bundles for React/Vue/Next/Express routes. Surfaces unlinked admin/internal routes. 7 tests pass.

jsbundle-secrets.description: Recovers original source from JS bundles via sourcemaps, then scans with gitleaks-grade rules for secrets that vanish from minified output.
jsbundle-secrets.trl_evidence: Sourcemap recovery via go-common/jsbundle, embedded gitleaks-grade ruleset on recovered original source. 9 tests pass.

jsonp-finder.trl_evidence: Callback-parameter discovery + JSONP-response detection. Real but narrow.

jwt-debugger.trl_evidence: Basic multi-step logic without test coverage

jwt-pentest.description: Active JWT vulnerability battery: alg=none, weak-HMAC dictionary, kid traversal, jku/x5u SSRF, audience leakage, HS256↔RS256 confusion.
jwt-pentest.trl_ceiling_reason: Token-harvest path missing; caller must supply ?jwt=. Reaches TRL 7 with active replay against target's auth endpoint.
jwt-pentest.trl_evidence: alg=none, weak-HMAC dictionary, kid traversal, jku/x5u, audience leakage, HS256↔RS256 confusion. Offline path complete. 10 tests pass.

keyword-density.trl_evidence: 1.3.1: Snowball Porter stemming for 15 languages (English/French/German/Italian/Spanish/Portuguese/Dutch/Swedish/Norwegian/Danish/Finnish/Turkish/Russian/Hungarian/Romanian); UnigramsStemmed emitted when stemmer available; KeywordStuffing flag (top-unigram density >5%) with dedicated verdict. 10/10 corpus PASS; verified: 'software'/'softwar' stem merge on kalzumeus.com.

legal-entity.trl_ceiling_reason: Authoritative validation requires jurisdiction-specific registries or paid company data.
legal-entity.trl_evidence: Legal extraction returns entity names, jurisdiction hints, addresses, VAT/company identifiers, source evidence, and tests.

loadbalancer-detect.trl_evidence: Basic multi-step logic without test coverage

local-proofreader.trl_evidence: text tool, grammar and style checking

login-analyzer.trl_ceiling_reason: Real login analysis needs flow-tracing, CSRF/OAuth/SAML detection, which overlap with session-fixation + jwt-pentest. Better to fold into those.

mime-trap.trl_evidence: Multi-function structure, limited error handling and tests

mobile-friendly.trl_evidence: Multi-function structure, limited error handling and tests

nlp-extractinfo.name: NLP / Compromise
nlp-extractinfo.trl_evidence: NLP service, information extraction, multi-model logic

node-search-duck.name: Search DuckDuckGo (Node)
node-search-duck.trl_evidence: Node search wrapper, basic API integration

oauth-mapper.trl_ceiling_reason: Runtime auth-flow verification needs client credentials or interactive login state.
oauth-mapper.trl_evidence: OIDC/OAuth well-known parsing, JWKS probing, deprecated-flow/security issue triage, endpoint origin checks, SSRF guard, and tests.

ocr-pdf.description: Extract text from PDFs — upload or URL
ocr-pdf.name: OCR / PDF
ocr-pdf.trl_evidence: OCR service, document processing, multi-format support

office-locations.trl_evidence: Curated validation logic, error handling, some test coverage

open-redirect.trl_evidence: Multi-function structure, limited error handling and tests

outlink-graph.trl_evidence: DOM walk with public-suffix handling, rel-attribute parsing. Clean code, real evidence trails.

page-load-metrics.trl_evidence: Curated validation logic, error handling, some test coverage

payment-detector.trl_evidence: 27 gateways with Stripe/PayPal variant resolution (Checkout vs Elements vs Connect), BNPL, regional (PIX/UPI/iDEAL), crypto.

phone-extractor.trl_evidence: libphonenumber-grade extraction, region detection, context windows. ~50KB of focused logic.

press-mentions.trl_evidence: Curated validation logic, error handling, some test coverage

price-range.trl_evidence: Basic multi-step logic without test coverage

proto-pollution.description: Static scan for prototype-pollution sink patterns (Object.assign, lodash.merge, deepmerge) in recovered JS bundles.
proto-pollution.trl_ceiling_reason: Static-only without endpoint discovery; reaches TRL 7 once wired to api-extractor for auto-probe targets.
proto-pollution.trl_evidence: Static scan for known sink patterns (Object.assign, lodash.merge by hash). Active probe documented but not wired. 6 tests pass.

proxy-fingerprint.trl_evidence: Multi-function structure, limited error handling and tests

pwa-manifest.trl_evidence: Multi-function structure, limited error handling and tests

random-proxy.description: Routes to a random proxy backend (?url=)
random-proxy.name: Proxy (Random)

ratelimit-tester.trl_evidence: Basic multi-step logic without test coverage

react-data-grid.trl_evidence: React component, mature data grid, comprehensive features

redirect-tracer.trl_evidence: Redirect-chain tracing with loop detection, header validation.

robots-analyzer.trl_evidence: 1.3.1: RFC 9309 §2.2.2 path matching with $ end-anchor and * wildcards; §2.3 precedence (specific UA > wildcard, longest-match wins, Allow beats Disallow on ties); Request-rate + Visit-time directive parsing; CrawlabilityMatrix evaluates 7 probe paths × {*, Googlebot, top-3 site UAs}. 10/10 corpus PASS; verified evidence: HN matrix shows /login disallowed for both * and Googlebot.

robots-parser.trl_evidence: RFC 9309 compliant: longest-match, wildcards, crawl-delay, Sitemap discovery. 10-case test suite.

scc.trl_ceiling_reason: Full complexity for SPAs needs post-JS DOM rendering.
scc.trl_evidence: Structural complexity scoring parses DOM/resource counts, third-party domains, gzip estimate, stable scoring labels, and tests.

schema-extractor.trl_ceiling_reason: Schema injected only after client-side rendering needs a JS DOM fetcher.
schema-extractor.trl_evidence: Extracts JSON-LD, Microdata, RDFa, rich-result type summaries, caps oversized blocks, SSRF guard, and unit tests.

search-bing-go.trl_ceiling_reason: depends on paid API or browser crawling
search-bing-go.trl_evidence: External API abstraction with gazetteers, no independent detection logic

search-duck-go.trl_evidence: Minimal scaffolding, no substantive handler code

seasonal-detector.trl_ceiling_reason: Reaches TRL 7 with per-country holiday gazetteer + urgency-language regex.

secrets-scanner.trl_evidence: Entropy + curated regex (AWS/Stripe/SendGrid/etc) on response bodies.

security-headers.trl_evidence: RFC-aware CSP parsing, HSTS validation, score-based verdicts, cross-header isolation checks.

seo-basics.trl_evidence: 1.3.1: multi-sitemap parsing (RFC 9309 §2.2.4 allows multiple Sitemap: directives) with per-sitemap reachability/Content-Type probe; canonical reachability probe (status + same-host + self-reference); pathsEqualish handles trailing-slash equivalence. 9/10 corpus PASS.

session-fixation.description: Two-pass probe testing whether session cookies persist value across login. Cookie-name gazetteer covers PHPSESSID/JSESSIONID/ASP.NET_SessionId/etc.
session-fixation.trl_ceiling_reason: SPA login flows (JSON POST with custom headers) not yet detected; CSRF-protected logins are misclassified.
session-fixation.trl_evidence: Two-pass probe with cookie-name gazetteer (PHPSESSID/JSESSIONID/etc), classic-flow login pages. 5 tests pass.

session-management.trl_ceiling_reason: needs authenticated session state for full testing
session-management.trl_evidence: Session inference with gazetteers but no evidence structure

simulate-ddos.trl_evidence: DDoS simulation logic present but policy-blocked from public deployment

sitemap-finder.description: Discovers a site's sitemaps via robots.txt + common-path probes, follows sitemapindex chains, decompresses .gz, returns URL inventory sorted by lastmod with an evidence trail.
sitemap-finder.trl_evidence: Recursive sitemap-index chaser, gunzip, robots-aware, SSRF-guarded, lastmod-sorted output. Live-verified on stripe/google/nytimes/shopify.

smuggling-probe.trl_ceiling_reason: Timing-only request smuggling signals require manual confirmation to avoid false positives.
smuggling-probe.trl_evidence: Raw TCP/TLS request-boundary probes cover CL.TE, TE.CL, TE.TE, duplicate CL, SSRF-sticky resolution, deltas, and tests.

subdomain-finder.trl_ceiling_reason: CT-log free tiers rate-limit aggressively; reaching TRL 8 would need a paid CT mirror (DNSDB) or self-hosted CT replica.
subdomain-finder.trl_evidence: 1.5.0+: URL-input coercion (1.4.1) + sitemap.xml source parsing both robots.txt Sitemap: directives and /sitemap.xml fallback with <urlset>/<sitemapindex> XML envelope parsing (1.4.2); TLD-anchored homepage regex (rightmost label 2-24 ASCII letters) eliminates IP/version-string false positives. 10/10 corpus PASS.

substack-scraper.description: Public-metadata scraper for Substack publications: posts, cadence, recommendations, authors.
substack-scraper.trl_evidence: Metadata extraction, API scraping, post parsing.

swagger-finder.trl_evidence: Hardcoded path list. Superseded by api-extractor v1.2.2 which covers 31 OpenAPI paths plus AsyncAPI/gRPC-Web.

tech-stack.trl_ceiling_reason: Dynamic-only framework evidence requires JS rendering for full coverage.
tech-stack.trl_evidence: Frontend/backend technology fingerprints across frameworks, CSS, CMS, analytics, CDN, server headers, versions, JSON API shape, and tests.

technology-stack.trl_ceiling_reason: Dynamic-only or authenticated stack signals need JS rendering and session context.
technology-stack.trl_evidence: Infrastructure fingerprints cover headers, cookies, hosting/CDN, CMS, runtime, JS/CSS vendors, analytics, payments, confidence, and tests.

tos-finder.trl_evidence: Curated 30+ canonical paths for ToS/Privacy/DMCA/etc + freshness check.

trust-decay.trl_evidence: domain analysis tool, basic multi-step logic

typosquat-finder.trl_ceiling_reason: Bounded by seed-brand dictionary you ship. Real upgrade needs malicious-domain corpus from threat intel.

ugc-detector.trl_ceiling_reason: Reaches TRL 7 with schema.org Review parsing + moderation-system fingerprints.

url-shortener.trl_ceiling_reason: needs real browser DOM for URL preview
url-shortener.trl_evidence: Multi-step detection with tests, SSRF guards, verdict structure

user-demographics.trl_ceiling_reason: needs ML model for accuracy beyond basic heuristics
user-demographics.trl_evidence: Comprehensive inference with tests, SSRF protection, multi-fetch logic

utils-readcontent.name: Read Content
utils-readcontent.trl_evidence: 9/10 corpus PASS (1 BROKEN: news.ycombinator.com returns 500 — pre-existing edge case, not regression). Extracts structured article content from real-world sites across SaaS landing pages, news sites, government, blogs.

video-content.description: Video-content detector: schema.org VideoObject parsing, platform detection (YouTube/Vimeo/Wistia), autoplay + accessibility scoring.
video-content.trl_ceiling_reason: needs ML model for codec and bitrate inference
video-content.trl_evidence: RFC-compliant video detection with tests, SSRF guards, verdict structure

wayback-checker.trl_evidence: CDX API integration, snapshot distribution analysis, historical HTTPS adoption trends.

website-carbon.trl_ceiling_reason: needs authenticated session for extended carbon source data
website-carbon.trl_evidence: Carbon calculation with verdict logic but limited test coverage

wellknown-scanner.trl_evidence: All RFC 8615 paths probed with response classification.

wp-plugins.trl_ceiling_reason: Vulnerability enrichment needs a maintained plugin CVE/WPScan-style dataset.
wp-plugins.trl_evidence: WordPress fingerprinting covers generator/header/assets, plugin/theme versions, endpoint exposure, confidence scoring, and unit tests.

wps.trl_ceiling_reason: Lab-grade Core Web Vitals require real browser timings rather than static analysis.
wps.trl_evidence: Performance score combines transport, compression, render blockers, image formats, cache headers, resource hints, asset sampling, and tests.

xss-payload.trl_evidence: security tooling, payload generation and validation

xss-scanner.trl_ceiling_reason: Real XSS confirmation requires DOM canary injection (headless browser). Reflection regex isn't real XSS.
